title: manettia lygistum var. alba
intro: Manettia lygistum var. alba, also known as the White Jamaica dogwood, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Manettia lygistum var. alba include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments.
